name: Ashwagandha Root Extract
summary: Reduces stress, cortisol levels, and anxiety scores.
description: Ashwagandha root extract is linked to reduced stress markers and anxiety scores, consistent with dampening stress-axis signaling and downstream inflammatory effects.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known hypersensitivity to ashwagandha or nightshade family plants
pregnancy or breastfeeding due to possible abortifacient effects and insufficient safety data
thyroid disorders or thyroid hormone medications due to risk of excess thyroid stimulation
sedative medications or alcohol due to additive drowsiness
autoimmune conditions such as rheumatoid arthritis or lupus or multiple sclerosis due to immune-stimulating effects
liver disease or hepatotoxic medications due to rare reports of liver injury
